autoscaling.scalingpolicy.metric.Dimensi.Docs: The dimensions for the metric. For the list of available dimensions, see the AWS documentation available from the table in [AWS services that publish CloudWatch metrics ](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/aws-services-cloudwatch-metrics.html) in the *Amazon CloudWatch User Guide*.   Conditional: If you published your metric with dimensions, you must specify the same dimensions in your scaling policy.

autoscaling.scalingpolicy.metric.Namespa.Docs: The namespace of the metric. For more information, see the table in [AWS services that publish CloudWatch metrics ](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/aws-services-cloudwatch-metrics.html) in the *Amazon CloudWatch User Guide*.
